Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0882 "RAIDOVERMOSCOW-0B40-0882" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0b40 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Raid over Moscow.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0B40 to set the border colour to black before starting the game (which the original loader did not).
Also changed the LDY #$D0 instruction at $8D71 to LDY #$D1 to fix some corrupted graphics at the bottom of the world overview map.
As the original did not have a loading screen, the one included was converted from the Amstrad CPC version by DATA-LAND of Technische Maschinenfabrik (https://csdb.dk/scener/?id=4845).
